Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC is covered and where competitor fitments represent untapped inventory opportunities, without any manual comparison work.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data on fitments where DFC currently has no two-piece rotor offering.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Activates real customer demand signals to prioritize which gaps are worth filling, turning a passive catalog exercise into an active revenue intelligence loop.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitment data, cross-reference results, and incoming customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a clean, decision-ready catalog document that Dino can act on immediately for purchasing and inventory planning.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions — and extracts the full text content of every live ad.
Meta Investigation.impact: Pulls a complete, real-time snapshot of all live ad copy in seconds, eliminating the need to manually open and review individual ads in each platform's UI.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all extracted ad copy for specific flagged phrases or patterns and compiles a structured list of every match with the exact field and verbatim copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Surfaces compliance or brand risks instantly across an entire ad portfolio, replacing what would otherwise be a tedious manual string-search across dozens of ads.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted report email listing every flagged ad with the specific field, exact copy, and platform where each prohibited phrase was detected.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a precise, actionable violation report in the right person's inbox immediately, enabling fast remediation before flagged ads cause compliance or brand issues.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Pulls live performance data and ad copy from all active Meta and TikTok campaigns to serve as the real-time knowledge base for the chatbot.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Gives the chatbot accurate, up-to-date campaign data so every answer reflects actual live performance rather than stale exports.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Answers on-demand questions about paid channel performance, ad copy, spend pacing, and optimization opportunities using the live Meta and TikTok data as context.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Enables anyone on the team to get instant, accurate paid media answers without waiting for an analyst to pull a report or log into the ad platforms.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details from each email, and triggers the review workflow.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures no application is missed or left sitting in a shared inbox, with every submission automatically routed for processing the moment it arrives.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF into an organized Drive folder structure, categorized by role and applicant name, for a persistent and searchable archive.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, organized applicant file system automatically, eliminating manual PDF filing and making historical applications easy to retrieve.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume, scores the candidate against the requirements of the open role, and produces a hiring recommendation along with a disposition: approve for review, deny, or flag as pending due to a paused role.
Resume Bot.impact: Reduces resume screening time from hours to seconds per applicant, ensuring consistent, criteria-based scoring across every candidate without reviewer fatigue.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant with their score, disposition, and resume link to a master dashboard, with denied and approved candidates in the main tab and paused-role candidates held in a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a single real-time dashboard of all applicants and decisions, eliminating the need to track candidates across emails and documents manually.

summary: Our automation pipeline is running strong with 56 total agents — 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 in the planned queue. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week. We did celebrate one milestone: the Paid Channel Chatbot moved to Completed status, giving the team an on-demand tool to quickly query paid channel performance. Great work to everyone pushing these builds forward — steady progress across the board!
